recommendations.overview: Following the breakdown of his marriage, a self-involved man begins to embrace fatherhood.

recommendations.title: Electroma
recommendations.overview: Two robots embark on a quest to become human.

recommendations.title: Tuff Turf
recommendations.overview: The new guy in a Los Angeles high school, Morgan, does some singing and fights hotshot Nick over disco dancer Frankie.

recommendations.title: Berberian Sound Studio
recommendations.overview: In the 1970s, a British sound technician is brought to Italy to work on the sound effects for a gruesome horror film. His nightmarish task slowly takes over his psyche, driving him to confront his own past.
